generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor collecting real-time occupancy metrics in building infrastructure, integrated via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor measuring environmental conditions (temperature, humidity, CO2 levels) in building spaces, embedded in BIM for semantic alignment."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyUsageSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor tracking real-time energy consumption across building systems (HVAC, lighting, appliances), normalized via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance SystemPerformanceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor monitoring building system performance (HVAC efficiency, lighting operation), synchronized with BIM-enriched runtime metadata."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SystemPerformanceDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalConditionSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyUsageSensor
]

instance SystemPerformanceDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SystemPerformanceSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic backbone for static and dynamic building data, enriched with runtime metadata (sensor configurations, control logic, Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware specifications)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BimToRuntimeTransformation, BimToMiddlewareTransformation
]

instance RuntimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data ingested from IoT sensors (occupancy, environmental conditions, energy usage) via Eclipse Hono/Ditto protocols (MQTT/AMQP)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, EnergyDataTransmitted, SystemPerformanceDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoDigitalTwinManager, HonoIoTConnectivity
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning policies for adaptive control (e.g., BOREALIS) enabling energy and comfort optimization in building systems."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BorealReinforcementLearning
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model rendered in Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring and simulation of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance GeneratedDeploymentArtifacts : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Automatically derived deployment scripts and middleware configurations generated from BIM via model-to-model and model-to-text transformations (e.g., Eclipse Modeling Framework)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoIoTConnectivity, DittoDigitalTwinManager
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BimToRuntimeTransformation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tool automating extraction of domain semantics from BIM and generating runtime interfaces via model-to-model and model-to-text transformations."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedDeploymentService
]

instance BimToMiddlewareTransformation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation process embedding sensor configurations and metadata directly into BIM for streamlined Eclipse Hono/Ditto deployment."
    DTDFVocab:enables MiddlewareConfigurationService
]

instance HonoIoTConnectivity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono-based IoT connectivity and edge computing for real-time data ingestion from physical devices using MQTT/AMQP protocols."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataIngestionService, BidirectionalCommunicationService
]

instance DittoDigitalTwinManager : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto framework managing digital twin lifecycle and enabling bidirectional communication between physical and virtual assets."
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinSynchronizationService, AutomatedCommissioningService
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing rich, interactive 3D visualization for immersive monitoring and simulation of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance BorealReinforcementLearning : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework (BOREALIS) enabling adaptive control policies for energy and comfort optimization in building systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling real-time data acquisition from IoT sensors via Eclipse Hono, normalizing and ingesting data into the DT runtime environment."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataInsight
]

instance DigitalTwinSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service maintaining continuous synchronization between physical assets and their digital twins via Eclipse Ditto bidirectional communication."
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationFidelityInsight
]

instance AutomatedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating deployment of runtime artifacts (middleware configurations, sensor mappings) derived from BIM via model-driven transformations."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentAutomationAction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalDashboardInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing adaptive control policies (e.g., lighting, HVAC) using BOREALIS reinforcement learning for real-time optimization."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlPolicyOptimizationAction
]

instance BidirectionalCommunicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling seamless data exchange between virtual and physical assets via Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:provides CommunicationFidelityInsight
]

instance MiddlewareConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides MiddlewareConfigurationInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service simulating building operations and life cycle scenarios using Unreal Engine 5 and BIM models for design evaluation."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationScenarioInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating the commissioning process between virtual and physical assets, ensuring alignment of control logic and sensor configurations."
    DTDFVocab:provides CommissioningValidationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard showing current occupancy patterns, environmental conditions, and energy consumption across building systems."
]

    base:desc "Metric evaluating the synchronization quality between physical assets and their digital twins, measured via Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE)."
]

    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization in Unreal Engine 5 displaying building operations, system performance, and environmental metrics in real-time."
]

]

    base:desc "Predicted energy savings opportunities identified through DT simulations and adaptive control policies."
]

    base:desc "Assessment of occupant comfort levels (thermal, visual, air quality) based on real-time environmental data and predictive models."
]

    base:desc "Automated adjustment of control policies (lighting, HVAC) to optimize energy consumption and occupant comfort using BOREALIS reinforcement learning."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeploymentAutomationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation and deployment of runtime artifacts (middleware, sensor mappings) from BIM models with minimal manual intervention."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CommissioningValidationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated validation of bidirectional communication and control logic alignment between physical and virtual assets during commissioning."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MiddlewareConfigurationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Configuration status and performance metrics of Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware managing data exchange between physical and virtual domains."
]

instance SimulationScenarioInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Evaluated scenarios from DT simulations covering design decisions, operational efficiency, and refurbishment strategies throughout the building lifecycle."
]

instance CommunicationFidelityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of data exchange quality between physical sensors and virtual models, ensuring minimal latency and loss in bidirectional communication."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction is enabled through **bidirectional communication** between the DT and the physical building infrastructure, leveraging the **BIM-centric control configuration framework** (TwinLight) and **reinforcement learning-based control policies** (BOREALIS). The DT generates control signals (e.g., lighting adjustments) that are transmitted back to the physical system via the middleware, ensuring real-time synchronization and operational optimization. This interaction is automated and integrated into the BIM model for seamless deployment."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time synchronization** time scale, ensuring continuous exchange of data between the physical twin (PT) and the virtual twin (VT). The system is designed for **low-latency interactions**, particularly for **operational monitoring and control** (e.g., adaptive lighting adjustments in BOREALIS). The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the **degree of synchronization** and **interoperability** between the PT and VT, ensuring that the DT remains **up-to-date with the physical system’s state**. The time scale is aligned with the **runtime operational needs** of the AECO domain, where **immediate feedback loops** are critical for optimization and decision-making."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  1. **BIM Core**: Central semantic repository for building data.
  2. **Middleware Layer (Eclipse Hono/Ditto)**: Handles real-time data exchange and device management.
  3. **Control Layer**: Implements adaptive control logic (e.g., TwinLight’s lighting control, BOREALIS’s RL policies).
  4. **Visualization Layer (Unreal Engine 5)**: Provides immersive interfaces for facility managers.
  5. **Extension Points**: Standardized interfaces for integrating custom services (e.g., energy analytics, predictive maintenance).
  The constellation supports **modular composition**, allowing DTs to scale from **single-zone systems** to **entire building infrastructures** while maintaining interoperability."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the **entire building life cycle**, covering phases from **initial design and construction** to **operation, refurbishment, and adaptation**. It bridges the gap between **as-designed (ideal) representations** in BIM and **as-operated (real-time) representations** by integrating runtime data and control logic. The framework ensures continuity across these stages, enabling **data-driven decision-making** and **optimization** throughout the asset’s life cycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Automated data validation** during model deployment (e.g., checking for missing sensor metadata or conflicting configurations).
  - **Real-time synchronization** via Eclipse Hono/Ditto to minimize latency in data transmission.
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart, addressing **semantic drift** (as discussed in Abbasi et al.).
  - **Uncertainty management**: The framework accommodates **sensor inaccuracies** and **model approximations** (e.g., in reinforcement learning) by incorporating probabilistic models or confidence intervals.
  - **Verification and validation (V&V)**: Includes **case studies (e.g., Living Lab deployments)** and **stakeholder feedback** to refine the DT’s accuracy and usability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and the digital twin (DT) is facilitated by **Eclipse Hono and Ditto**, which provide **real-time data exchange** and **bidirectional communication** protocols. These platforms enable **low-latency synchronization** of sensor data, control signals, and operational metadata between the PT and VT. The document does not specify **exact network protocols** (e.g., MQTT, AMQP) but emphasizes the use of **standardized middleware** to ensure **interoperability** and **scalability** across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed through an **automated, model-driven pipeline** that generates runtime artifacts from enriched BIM models. The deployment process is **scalable and reproducible**, reducing manual intervention and engineering overhead. The framework supports **modular service integration**, allowing for flexible deployment architectures. Hosting is not explicitly detailed in the document, but the focus is on **automated deployment** and **runtime configuration management** for adaptability."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is enabled through **standardized extension points** in the DT framework, allowing for seamless communication with external systems and services. While specific external systems (e.g., ERP, CMMS) are not mentioned, the modular architecture supports **interoperability** with other AECO-specific tools and platforms. The framework adheres to **BIM standards** for semantic alignment and data exchange."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, primarily **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**, which serves as the semantic backbone for the framework. While specific standards (e.g., IFC, bSDD) are not explicitly listed, the approach is designed to ensure **compatibility with existing AECO systems and workflows**. The model-driven methodology promotes **interoperability** and **consistency** across the DT life cycle."
]
